title: juncellus pustulatus
intro: Juncellus pustulatus, also known as spotted restharrow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family. It is a flowering plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of phenolic compounds and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Juncellus pustulatus is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and promote tissue repair.
